top_findings.summary: The skill requests broad Bash command execution permissions (`aws:*`, `gcloud:*`, `nginx:*`) that extend far beyond configuration generation. While the skill's stated purpose is to "generate production-ready configurations," these permissions allow it to execute arbitrary administrative commands on cloud infrastructure and local services (including destructive operations, service restarts, and resource modifications) without clear constraints related to configuration generation alone. This represents significant privilege escalation beyond the documented scope of creating configuration files.
